programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Alarm bells ring for Michaela, as a super-fit dad suddenly has slurred speech. Father-daughter team Brett and Teagan finally work together. Eamon and Mike’s patient can’t stop coughing. A tiny baby gives Leonard and Cullen a huge scare.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Real Emergency: Episode
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Flight paramedic Steve and the team respond to a horrific crash, where a single-mum has gone off a bridge and into water. Newly-minted MICA paramedic Leonard needs all his skills to help a karate student make it back from a cardiac arrest.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Emergency responders face real-life crises, including accidents, medical emergencies, and rescue operations. The show follows paramedics, police, and firefighters as they handle high-pressure situations. Through real footage and firsthand accounts, it reveals the intensity and urgency of emergency services.
